name: companion-module-corevideo-obs
description: Bitfocus Companion module for CoreVideo OBS plugin — Zoom participant routing and meeting control

companion.name: CoreVideo OBS
companion.description: Unified control for CoreVideo: Zoom participant routing, OBS Studio, and Sidecar show phase management — all in one module.
companion.author: CoreVideo
companion.help: Connects to three services: CoreVideo plugin (port 19870, required), OBS WebSocket v5 (port 4455, optional), and CoreVideo Sidecar (port 19880, optional).
